_instructions: Add your work experience here. Copy the experience object for each job.

experiences.title: AI/ML Engineer
experiences.description:
Built a production RAG assistant on internal reporting data using OpenAI APIs, LangChain, and a Pinecone vector store; enabled non-technical stakeholders to query analytics in natural language and reduced ad-hoc analyst requests by 35%.
Designed and iterated on chunking strategy, embedding model selection, and prompt engineering templates (system prompts, few-shot examples, guardrails) with structured evaluation criteria (faithfulness, answer relevance, retrieval precision), lifting LLM response accuracy from 62% to 88% on a curated ground-truth test set.
Owned data architecture for 3 production databases across 5+ concurrent projects, defining schema design, indexing strategy, and integrity constraints that reduced downstream engineering corrections by 15%.
Designed 10+ Python and SQL automation workflows replacing entirely manual reporting processes, recovering 20 hours per month of analyst capacity and improving data freshness to near real time.
Applied statistical profiling across production logs to isolate persistent bottlenecks, implemented targeted fixes achieving a 10% performance gain and 25% reduction in critical errors with full regression coverage.

experiences.title: AI/ML Engineering Intern
experiences.description:
Built a Python-based anomaly detection service from scratch using Isolation Forest with threshold-based fallbacks, improving hardware fault detection accuracy by 25% and increasing network reliability by 20% across a subscriber base of millions.
Developed and evaluated ML model pipelines on GCP (BigQuery, Vertex AI), contributing to team-wide migration from legacy analytics tooling through structured enablement sessions and hands-on workshops across 3+ teams.
Redesigned 8 ETL pipelines in Palantir Foundry with fully automated, idempotent workflows, reducing processing time by 30% and establishing data reliability standards adopted across the product organization.
Designed and maintained A/B testing infrastructure for ML-driven product feature evaluations, introducing statistical rigor to rollout decisions previously based on intuition.
Collaborated with data and product teams to surface model insights, translating outputs into actionable recommendations and supporting cross-functional alignment on AI adoption priorities.

experiences.title: Programmer Analyst
experiences.description:
Architected an end-to-end data quality system using AWS Glue and Python across 12 interdependent datasets: automated profiling, schema validation, and anomaly flagging that improved pipeline efficiency by 41% and reduced system downtime by 15%.
Designed forecasting models in Python and Amazon Athena managing 500,000+ records; improved demand planning accuracy by 10% and contributed to an 8% quarterly revenue uplift by identifying demand signal patterns the incumbent model was ignoring.
Standardized cross-functional data definitions and delivery cadence across 4 teams, cutting reporting turnaround by 25%.
